zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Tilney於大約1360年出生在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓時，她的父親Sir Frederick Tilney56歲，母親Margaret Rocheford62歲。她和John Skipwith II至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1436年之後在英國林可爾史爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾可福納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Tilney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Tilney (Norfolk), which derives its name from the Old English personal name Tila, Tilla (genitive Tilan, Tillan) + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Tilney was born about 1360, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Frederick Tilney, was 56 and her mother, Margaret Rocheford, was 62. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with John Skipwith II. She died after 1436, in Lincolnshire, England, and was buried in Covenham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Tilney est née environ 1360, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Frederick Tilney, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Margaret Rocheford, avait 62 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec John Skipwith II. Elle est décédée après 1436, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Covenham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Tilneyが約1360年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた時，父Sir Frederick Tilneyは56歳，母Margaret Rochefordは62歳であった。彼女はJohn Skipwith IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1436年以後にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 링코실르 소우스 오메스비 위스 케츠비 앤드 캘스비 앤드 드리비
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Tilney(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Frederick Tilney(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Rocheford(은)는 62세였다. 그녀는 John Skipwith II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1436년 이후 영국 링코실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 커븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Tilney nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Frederick Tilney, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Rocheford, tinha 62 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com John Skipwith II. Ela faleceu após 1436, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Covenham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England: соут ормесби вит кецби анд калсеби анд дриби, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Tilney родилась около 1360 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Frederick Tilney было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Rocheford, 62. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от John Skipwith II. Она умерла после 1436 г. в местности линколншир, Англия и была похоронена в местности ковенам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
